meta.title: Prague Hike Ticket Finder
meta.description: Find the cheapest PID day ticket for your hike to suburban stops around Prague. Enter your destination and group size for an instant recommendation.

app.title: Prague Hike Ticket Finder
app.description: Find the best ticket for your hike to suburban stops around Prague. Zones are counted from the city centre (P, 0, B).

result.summary: Your best option is the {{ticketName}} valid for {{validity}} at {{price}} Kč.
result.summaryShortTerm: Your best option is the {{ticketName}} ({{validity}}). Buy one for each direction — {{quantity}} × {{perTicket}} Kč = {{total}} Kč round trip.
result.cutoffWarning: Valid until 4:00 AM the following day, not a full 24 hours.
result.purchase: Purchase via the <link>PID Lítačka app</link> or official PID channels.
result.noStop: No matching stop found. Please go back and pick a destination.

praguePass.label: I have a Prague PID pass
praguePass.help: Pre-paid pass for zones P, 0, B
